answer: Crime reports over the last 24 months show quarterly fluctuations. For example, in Q2 2023, incidents included aggravated assault, criminal trespass, and assault on a public servant, among others. A detailed breakdown of trends by quarter would require analyzing the full dataset for all reported crimes during this period.
